content:
God of Slaughter

Chapter 1551: Sweep Away Many Clans

Translator:

Sigma_

Editor:

SSins

Soul Clan’s territory in Sea Domain of Nihility.

A brilliant light door suddenly emerged above the cities of the Soul Clan. After a while, that light door materialized. A man walked out of that door.

It was Shi Yan.

The energy he got from swallowing Neptune, Keith, and Oliver wasn’t enough to reach the upper limit to break through again.

However, it was enough to refine another Absolute Beginning Original Symbol.

This Original Symbol formed an archaic symbol called “Shuttle,” which was a heavenly gateway in his Space power Upanishad. It was an extreme, supernatural ability, a new cognition in Space power Upanishad.

With the “Shuttle,” he could use his sharp sense to grasp the locations of so many territories. He could use his space energy to link to them and create a gateway that he could use freely.

He had used this newly-achieved supernatural ability to get to the Soul Clan’s base deep in the Sea Domain of Nihility from Musing Rain Territory.

His purpose was simple: slaughter to take lives and soul altars of the Soul Clan warriors to feed his soul energy and increase his God power to enter Second Sky of Territory Ancestor Realm faster.

Shi Yan had discussed with Zi Yao about the Absolute Beginning Era and the Absolute Beginning Gateway for a long time. They tacitly understood that they had to increase their power to get to the entrance of the Absolute Beginning Gateway together.

The Absolute Beginning Gateway hid the ultimate secret of the earth and heaven at their very beginning. It had the deepest imprint of the Great Path. Rumors say that the way and the direction to cultivate after the Territory Ancestor Realm was behind that door.

According to the rumors, Absolute Beginning was the last realm after Territory Ancestor Realm. At that realm, the expert would have formidable powers that could create the universe from thin air using his imagination.

Absolute Beginning creatures had slaughtered each other to reach Absolute Beginning Realm. They wanted to take their ancestor’s blood, which would eventually enable them to replace Absolute Beginning’s role!

Unfortunately, the Absolute Beginning Era ended and no one ever made it to that step.

The new era had created Third Sky of Territory Ancestor Realm experts like Sauron. Yuan Zu had survived to seek for the Absolute Beginning Gateway. Desolate and Devour had awakened. It became more possible to open the Absolute Beginning Gateway. Parties were accumulating power to do that.

They had to improve their power quickly. They had to reach the peak realm to counter with any fierce change that could happen in any minute.

Thus, he had to do that at all costs!

The Soul Clan, Devouring Clan, Ancient Monster Clan, and Black Demon Clan were the four strongest races in this time. When he was in the Sea Domain of Nihility, they had chased him around to kill him. They never wanted to leave him alone. They wanted to kill him to take the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower.

Time flew quickly. It had been one hundred years and the four great clans were still strong. However, Shi Yan wasn’t a weak warrior who they could bully.

Using lives of the four races in the Sea Domain of Nihility could help him accumulate energy quickly. It was his priority now.

The Soul Clan was his first stop!

Hovering above the territory of the Soul Clan, he quieted down for a long moment. All of a sudden, he roared and transformed to his Absolute Beginning body, the ferocious giant whose head touched the sky.

A terrifying energy that could smash the entire world emitted instantly and shadowed the heart of each Soul Clan warriors, hovering in each corner of the sky.

The massive black holes appeared above the territory of the Soul Clan like massive demon mouths. The energy that diffused from them was earth-destroying.

Soul Control, Death, Corrosion, and Dark power Upanishad appeared as the islands hovering in the sky of the Soul Clan. The islands created by white bones fumed the shattering energy as they arrayed in the world-destroying formation. Shi Yan stood among the islands and listened to the terrified screams of the Soul Clan warriors.

He roared and howled, “Neptune pursued me for the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower. The Soul Clan wanted my head with big rewards. Today, I’m here to see who can take the head off my neck!”

“Boom!”

Countless massive asteroids fell from the void. Tens of thousands of them like seething sea bombarded the Soul Clan’s territory under the Star power Upanishad’s control.

“Flaming meteors!”

The co-soul used the power Upanishad’s ability and the heaven flame to cast an attack. Flames moved like a flowing river of red iron and fell from the sky.

“Destructive power!”

“Curtain of Darkness!”

“Desperate heart!”

Shi Yan screamed continuously. His evil energies were like earth-shattering tornadoes that stormed towards the Soul Clan’s territory.

Masses of darkness landed and swallowed all the lights. Under the power of despair, each member of the Soul Clan was so hopeless and fearful. They had no hope.

The Soul Clan had been haughtily swaggering around the Sea Domain of Nihility and the other territories. They never thought that one day, a brute like Shi Yan could break the protection of the Soul Clan’s territory to massacre the Soul Clan warriors!

The eight great, evil powers, Space, Star, Fire, and Life were controlled smoothly and skillfully. Members of the Soul Clan fell one after another.

However, the members of the Soul Clan below King God Realm magically survived the savage, ruthless destruction.

Quite the contrary, the high-realm warriors were targets of this genocide. Warriors at Original God Realm, Ethereal God Realm, Incipient God Realm, and Immortal Realm were attacked by evil energies in the sky. Shi Yan’s red eyes gazed at them and they fell one after another.

Anyway, the low-realm warriors stopped providing a lot of energy to Shi Yan when they died.

Only the strongest warriors could supply energy that could help Shi Yan change in nature!

At this moment, Serene Prison of the Soul Clan wasn’t here. Neptune was dead. They still had another Territory Ancestor, but he had gone to Empty Land and left no Territory Ancestor to protect the clan.

The Soul Clan didn’t have the power to counterattack. They passively endure Shi Yan’s slaughter.

The current era had a long history of millions of years. The Seven Great Clans had to accumulate for a long time to get to their current foundation and power in this sea of stars.

No one dared to massacre people in the territories of the seven clans. Never before!

Today, it was the first time in history!

Just like a bloodthirsty demon, Shi Yan landed on the Soul Clan’s territories and deployed his bloody washing to the high-echelon members of the Soul Clan and swallow them in the end.

As the low-realm warriors were screaming horribly, Shi Yan’s slaughter lasted for several hours before he disappeared strangely.

The Black Demon Clan was next, followed by the Ancient Monster Clan and Devouring Clan. Shi Yan didn’t spare these three clans. He continued his genocide.

The situations in the other three clans were the same: Their strongest experts weren’t present when they attacked. Sauron had invited them to somewhere to discuss something discreetly. They didn’t know that their races were slaughtered bloodily.

Shi Yan had visited the Black Demon Clan and the Ancient Monster Clan, and killed tens of thousands of experts at Ethereal God Realm, Incipient God Realm, and Immortal Realm. Eventually, he went to Devouring Clan. In that dark world, he had slaughtered the members of the Devouring Clan and used the Devouring power Upanishad eating up each warrior.

The Devouring Clan’s headquarters had a deep sea where a secret place was hidden. Devour was cultivating there.

Shi Yan slaughtering the Devouring Clan had awakened Devour. He was very furious, indeed. Devour raised a massive abyss to cover the land. However, as soon as he came, he found flashes from a light door. Shi Yan slowly disappeared through that door.

The land of the Devouring Clan was left with countless corpses, asteroids, and countless flaming holes.

Shortly after, Shi Yan damaged the Devouring Clan and used the supernatural ability of Space power Upanishad to leave before Devour came.

Devour roared and hissed crazily. Looking at the corpses of his fellows, his anger seemed to pierce through barriers and enter the depths of Shi Yan’s soul.

“Wait for me to make the next breakthrough; you will be my target.”

Shi Yan’s soul energy came from nowhere and hovered in the void above the Devouring Clan and in Devour’s mind.

In his black hole form, Devour felt Shi Yan’s soul message, which enraged him furthermore. At this moment, he found that his resentment for Shi Yan had surpassed what he had for Desolate.

A light door emerged on the land of the Phantom Clan.

Shi Yan slowly walked out and went to the Phantom Clan’s holy land. He appeared from thin air above this fairyland.

Releasing the Soul Consciousness, he found Mei Ji shortly after. After a thought, he appeared by Mei Ji’s palace.

“Shi Yan!” Mei Ji was so happy.

“I’m here to make you an Absolute Beginning Original Symbol. This time, I got a big harvest. When I finish absorbing them, I can try to reach Second Sky of Territory Ancestor Realm. I think I can also refine one or two Original Symbols.” Shi Yan told her his purpose directly. “Is Montecie here?”

“Sauron invited her somewhere. I heard that the strongest experts of the seven clans were invited by Sauron,” Mei Ji explained, her eyes bright. “You said you got a big harvest. How was it? I heard that you had a big fight with Yuan Zu in Wavy River Star Area, but I don’t know the details.”

“Did you know that I’ve just been to the Soul Clan, Black Demon Clan, Devouring Clan, and Ancient Monster Clan?” Shi Yan grinned.

“No, I haven’t received any news,” Mei Ji shook her head.

“I think you will be busy soon when you receive information of the bloody massacre in their homelands. Although those areas didn’t gather all the members of the four clans, there is no doubt that most of their experts cultivated there. I’ve offended them all. Later on, it will be extremely deadly,” said Shi Yan without actual concern.

Mei Ji discolored in fear. “You... You had massacred the homelands of all four clans? Gosh! Did you do that?”

She couldn’t believe it.

“What they gave me, I will repay the same!” Shi Yan’s face was cold and heartless as he spoke indifferently. “It’s almost impossible for the top warriors of the four clans to kill me. I’m sure I won’t lose even if I have to fight alone. What is there to be afraid of? After I refine the energy I got this time, I will reach Second Sky of Territory Ancestor Realm. Hmm, Serene Prison, Beverly, and Edgar can’t kill me even if they join hands!”

His confidence left Mei Ji dumbstruck; she couldn’t get a hold of herself.
